title: Travels Through Time
summary: You can see through time, try to reach through it, and eventually even travel through it.
tiers: Tier 3: Temporal Acceleration or Time Loop
Tier 6: Call Through Time or Time Travel
gm_intrusions: Paradoxes are created. Others remember past events differently.
text: You can see through time, try to reach through it, and eventually even travel through it. (Although all character choices are subject to GM approval, Travels Through Time is a focus that the GM and player should probably have a long conversation about ahead of time, so the player knows the rules of time travel (if any) that exist in the GM’s setting. A character with this focus can drastically alter a setting, if the rules of time travel allow it.)
details: You can see through time, try to reach through it, and eventually even travel through it.

(Although all character choices are subject to GM approval, Travels Through Time is a focus that the GM and player should probably have a long conversation about ahead of time, so the player knows the rules of time travel (if any) that exist in the GM’s setting. A character with this focus can drastically alter a setting, if the rules of time travel allow it.)
